name: Network Investigation Playbook
description: Standard operating workflow for network threat hunting and PCAP packet forensics.

steps.title: Live Capture
steps.description: Monitor real-time network interface traffic and capture active flows.

steps.title: Nmap Scan
steps.description: Perform host discovery, open port enumeration, and service fingerprinting.
steps.details: Subnet scan complete. 8 active hosts and 14 open ports detected.

steps.title: PCAP Analysis
steps.description: Inspect PCAP payloads, decode HTTP/TLS headers, and isolate suspicious streams.
steps.details: Parsing Wireshark stream dis-assembler data for C2 traffic...

steps.title: Threat Intelligence
steps.description: Query ThreatIntel feeds (EPSS, CVE, AlienVault) against extracted IOCs.
steps.details: Awaiting completion of PCAP payload analysis.

steps.title: MITRE Mapping
steps.description: Correlate identified TTPs with ATT&CK matrix tactics and techniques.

steps.title: AI Analysis
steps.description: Run ATRE Threat Reasoner decision trees and probability confidence scoring.

steps.title: Generate Report
steps.description: Compile multi-stage forensic evidence into an executive investigation report.
